examples: I don't think you realise the gravity of the situation.
Arrows would continue to fly forward forever in a straight line were it not for gravity, which brings them down to earth.
How low gravity affects the human body.
Their bravery gave Christendom time both to regroup, and to realize the gravity of the threat.
During the hour and a half flight, space nuts get a total of 450 seconds of zero gravity.
